hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git push' && { cd /home/user/GemCode && echo '--- Pre-push validation ---' && bash .claude/hooks/validate-build.sh && jq -n '{systemMessage:"Pre-push validation passed."}' || jq -n '{"decision":"block","reason":"validate-build.sh failed — fix the errors above before pushing."}'; } || true

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit' && { cd /home/user/GemCode && STAGED=$(git diff --cached --stat 2>/dev/null || echo "(nothing staged)") && STATUS=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null) && jq -n --arg msg "Pre-commit — staged files:
$STAGED

Status:
${STATUS:-(clean)}" '{systemMessage:$msg}'; } || true

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push' && { cd /home/user/GemCode && BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current) && AHEAD=$(git rev-list origin/$BRANCH..HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && jq -n --arg msg "Push complete — branch: $BRANCH | commits ahead of remote: $AHEAD" '{systemMessage:$msg}'; } || true
